text_block_list.text:
On a certain day, Stay Gold and I decided to 
embark on a little expedition —

text_block_list.name: Announcement
text_block_list.text:
"To allow the express train to pass, we 
will be pausing service for a moment —"

Our destination is still many stations away. 
I leaned against the backrest, peeked out 
the window and —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, that boxed lunch looks pretty good～
choice_data_list: Huh?! She's outside?!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Now then! …Oh, wonder where we are～
choice_data_list: Shouldn't I be the one asking that?

text_block_list.text:
After leaving the station, we found 
ourselves in the shopping strip.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this store's got some pretty 
mysterious items.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I think they'd have some good souvenirs, 
let's check it out.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text: Welcome…… huh! May it be that you're Stay Gold!?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mhm, that's me, and?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
You've surprised this old man! To think 
I'd be granted the chance to meet you! 
I've seen you running in the races!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
And your races always keep me on the 
edge of my seat! I can never guess how 
they'll end when you're there.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text: ……Ah, that's right! Please give me one moment!!!

The storekeeper then dashed into 
the back of the store.
choice_data_list: Seems like you even reached people here
Seems like you even reached people here

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It seems like that.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
Whew, apologies for the wait! 
Here, would you accept this?
choice_data_list: This is… An embroidered patch?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
It's an emblem of my support! I made it 
thinking that it'd be nice if someone got 
to wear it someday.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……It's a good design. I see, it's handmade.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'll accept this with my gratitude. Now, I wonder where should I put this patch? Hehe.

Since it's not often we get to walk around 
like this, we decided to look for some 
touristy spots and —

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hey there! Did you just go mushroom 
foraging? Your basket… there's so 
many yummy looking mushrooms 
in there.

Stay Gold suddenly called out to an 
old lady carrying a large basket on 
her back.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text:
Yes yes, I was able to collect plenty of 
these from the mountainsides. Tonight 
shall be a mushroom feast～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mushroom feast… That sounds so good! …Hey! Could you let me have a taste too!?
choice_data_list: Eh! This suddenly!?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text:
My my, are you feeling hungry? 
Of course, of course, for you 
horsegirls need to eat well!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thank you! Please, I want to 
hear all about the mushrooms you 
got to pick today.

Stay Gold picked up the pace and walked 
off with the old lady. I quickly put my 
phone away and chased after her.
choice_data_list: Truly a girl who marches her own pace…
Truly a girl who marches her own pace…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …Ahh. This really hits the spot!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text: Fufu, to see you pour some tea on it to make a mushroom chazuke! Aren't you a curious child～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thought I'd give it a try. It's 
really yummy, y'know?

Copying Stay Gold, I poured some tea 
over my dish and—
choice_data_list: Oh, it's good!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, truly! I was thinking it may end up 
tasting bitter but that is not the case at all.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Just some of my survival experiences. 
As long as you prepare your food well 
enough, you'll have no worries.
choice_data_list: Ohh, I see

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Say, it's an impulsive thought, but 
do you have any mayonnaise?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Mushroom Mayo Ochazuke. It will definitely hit.
choice_data_list: Mushroom Mayonnaise Ochazuke!?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text: Yes I do, wait one moment dear. Fufu, what a fun child.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text: Do you feel like this when you're in a race?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm? …Well, that sounds about right.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Lady
text_block_list.text: Is that so, well that sounds absolutely delightful then. Fufu, I am most definitely looking forward to your races.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I ate something great, and I even got a cool souvenir. Ahh — What a satisfying day.
choice_data_list: Start of the day was a little worrying…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: But, it ended up being pretty good right?

Suddenly getting off at a random station, 
and dining at a local's place uninvited… 
Her liberty when it comes to these things 
has surprised me plenty of times but —
choice_data_list: Yeah, I really had a lot of fun today.
Yeah, I really had a lot of fun today.

text_block_list.text:
It is those who are a little unconventional 
that have the power to captivate others, 
charming not only those in this town… but 
myself also.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hum…… Now then, guess I'll need to start working hard from tomorrow again.

While saying that, she pulled out the patch 
received earlier from her pocket to take 
another look at it.
choice_data_list: We're training lots once we're back yeah
We're training lots once we're back yeah
You should report back with your next win
You should report back with your next win

text_block_list.text:
While saying that, she pulled out the patch 
received earlier from her pocket to take 
another look at it.
choice_data_list: We're training lots once we're back yeah
We're training lots once we're back yeah
You should report back with your next win
You should report back with your next win

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, aren't you pumped up?
choice_data_list: You reckon?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Though… I feel the same about today.

I find my gaze turning towards the street 
lights in the town outside shining on us.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. Guess it'll be worth a trip 
back here, wonder when that'll be.
choice_data_list: Don't let it take too long

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ! Hum. I see. Then I'll definitely come back, and I'll make it soon.
